ValidationRule.description: This VR used for ALD SF - IDF - SMART Integration CASE for synchronization
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c), $Permission.FLD_ALDSF_IDF_SMART_Synchronization_Critical, CONTAINS($Label.SMARTIDFCaseSubsidaryIndicator,Subsidiary_Indicator__c), OR(ISPICKVAL(Status,"Pending - External"),ISPICKVAL(Status,"Closed")), CreatedById =$Label.SmartIDFCreatedbyId, AND(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Origin))),ISPICKVAL(Origin, 'SMART'), OR(ISBLANK(TEXT(Service_Provider__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Sales_Channel__c)), ISBLANK(Last_description__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(Responsibility_of_communication__c)), ISBLANK(Order_Id__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(Partner__c))))), true,false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill out all the mandatory fields under 'Smart Communication Details' section to synchronize with SMART. Last Description | Partner | Order ID | Sales Channel | Service Provider | Responsibility of communication
